meaning: n.[天] 天底,最底点,最低点
examples: 1945 to 1946 was the nadir of Truman's presidency.
Company losses reached their nadir in 1999.
The episode may prove to have been the firm's nadir.
But no one is as passionate about baking as Nadir Gullu, the self-proclaimed "dessert despot".
As I masticate obediently, a priest stops at our table to shake Nadir's hand.
